## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change fixing an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change adding functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature causing existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactoring (no functional changes)
- [ ] Security fix

## Checklist

### Code Quality
- [ ] `pnpm lint` is clean (Biome)
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes
- [ ] `pnpm build` succeeds
- [ ] Self-review completed; no debug artifacts left

### Privacy
- [ ] No cross-session identity, cookies, or raw IP storage introduced
- [ ] No PII added to the D1 schema (closed-schema rule)

### Docs
- [ ] Docs / CHANGELOG updated if behavior or API changed
